language: swift
exerciseType: 1

# --instructions--

Stockez la valeur `true` dans la variable `power`

# --before-seed--

```swift
// DO NOT EDIT FROM HERE
import Foundation

var _testCount = 0
var _testFailedCount = 0
func tryCatch(_ assertion: Bool) {
    _testCount += 1
    if !assertion {
        _testFailedCount += 1
        print("Test Case '--err-t\(_testCount)--' failed")
    }
}
// DO NOT EDIT UNTIL HERE
```

# --asserts--

`power` doit être égale à `true`.

```swift
tryCatch(power == true)
```

# --after-asserts--

```swift
print("Executed \(_testCount) tests, with \(_testFailedCount) failures")
```
# --solutions--

```swift
let power = true;
```
